candidate.objective: Experienced pipeline and civil construction supervisor with a comprehensive background in poly welding, plant operation, dewatering systems, and crew leadership. Proven ability to manage multi-trade workforces, ensure WHS compliance, and deliver civil and pipeline projects to quality and schedule requirements across Western Australian mining and civil environments.

duties: Supervising dewatering and civil construction crews across multiple active project fronts.
Ensuring compliance with and implementation of company and site occupational health and safety requirements.
Conducting quality assurance inspections and audits to maintain project standards.
Optimising workflow planning to improve efficiency and project delivery.
Training and mentoring site personnel to develop skills and reinforce safety culture.
Planning and scheduling installation and maintenance works for water transfer systems.
Planning civil works to ensure quality outcomes and delivery to project schedules.
Performing poly welding on new and existing pipelines to specified standards, with accurate record keeping.
Completing bolt-up connections to specifications with full documentation.
Executing civil works associated with pipeline construction activities.
Operating excavators, loaders, skid steers, and rollers across various project sites.
Maintaining water transfer systems to ensure operational continuity.
Commissioning water transfer systems, including hydrostatic testing.
Installing and maintaining bores and pumps.
Adhering to all company and client site occupational health and safety requirements.
Performing poly welding on new and existing pipelines to specified standards, with accurate record keeping.
Completing bolt-up connections to specifications with full documentation.
Executing civil works associated with pipeline construction activities.
Operating excavators, loaders, skid steers, and rollers across various project sites.
Maintaining water transfer systems to ensure operational continuity.
Commissioning water transfer systems, including hydrostatic testing.
Installing and maintaining bores and pumps.
Adhering to all company and client site occupational health and safety requirements.
Operating civil construction machinery across a range of project activities.
Conducting civil maintenance of existing infrastructure.
Performing civil works associated with pipeline installation projects.
Completing load and haul operations as required.
Managing traffic control for site vehicle movements.
Inspecting worksites and conducting safety audits.
Adhering to all company and site occupational health and safety requirements.
Maintaining machinery and vehicles in serviceable condition.
Completing general hand duties as directed.
Installing and maintaining garage doors, motors, and associated components.
Diagnosing faults and performing repairs to motors, circuit boards, sprocket assemblies, remotes, and receivers.
Interpreting parts catalogues and managing parts ordering.
Planning and scheduling installation works.
Providing customer service and processing warranty claims.
Preparing invoices and utilising hand and power tools to complete installation tasks.

skills.detail: Extensive experience in HDPE poly welding, pipeline installation, commissioning, hydrostatic testing, and maintenance across dewatering and water transfer systems in mining and civil construction environments.
Certified and experienced operator of excavators, IT loaders, front-end loaders, skid steers, rollers, and C2 cranes.
Demonstrated ability to lead and supervise multi-trade civil and pipeline crews, manage workflow, and mentor junior staff in safety and technical competency.
Proficient in WHS legislation, SRMS supervisor responsibilities, OH&S implementation, quality assurance, and site auditing across mining and civil environments.

certifications.details: Certified operator of integrated tool carrier (IT) loaders.
Certified poly welder with experience across HDPE pipeline installation, maintenance, and commissioning.
Site Radiation Management System Supervisor certification.
Current Western Australian Heavy Rigid (HR) Drivers Licence.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
